hypothesis: Incorporating a differentiable micromechanics homogenization model (e.g., Mori–Tanaka or self-consistent scheme) as an additional physics constraint within the diffusion denoiser will increase the fraction of generated composites that simultaneously achieve Yield Strength ≥ 3500 MPa and Thermal Conductivity ≥ 1.0 W/mK by at least 15% compared to PCDiff using only non-negativity and sum-to-one regularization.
